---
title: "Travels"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/d3/7.8.5/d3.min.js"></script>
      <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/topojson/3.0.2/topojson.min.js"></script>
---
<style>
body {
  background-image: url('images/background.jpg');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-attachment: fixed;
}
</style>

## Where I've Been

Click on a highlighted country to learn more. Drag to pan and scroll to zoom.

```{=html}
<div id="map-container" style="width:100%;max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;">
  <div id="tooltip" style="position:absolute;background:rgba(15,15,26,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border:1px solid #5bcefa;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;color:#e0e0e0;font-size:14px;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s ease;z-index:100;max-width:220px;">
    <div class="country-name" style="color:#5bcefa;font-weight:600;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:4px;"></div>
    <div class="country-region" style="color:#b0b0b0;font-size:12px;"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="popup" style="display:none;position:absolute;background:rgba(15,15,26,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border:1px solid #5bcefa;border-radius:14px;padding:20px;color:#e0e0e0;font-size:14px;z-index:200;max-width:320px;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;">
      <div id="popup-name" style="color:#5bcefa;font-weight:700;font-size:20px;"></div>
      <div id="popup-close" style="color:#b0b0b0;cursor:pointer;font-size:20px;padding:0 4px;">&times;</div>
    </div>
    <div id="popup-region" style="color:#7c73ff;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;"></div>
    <div id="popup-desc" style="line-height:1.6;color:#c0c0c0;"></div>
  </div>
  <svg id="world-map" style="width:100%;height:auto;cursor:grab;"></svg>
  <div style="position:absolute;bottom:10px;right:10px;display:flex;gap:6px;">
    <button id="zoom-in" style="background:rgba(15,15,26,0.8);border:1px solid #5bcefa;color:#5bcefa;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;">+</button>
    <button id="zoom-out" style="background:rgba(15,15,26,0.8);border:1px solid #5bcefa;color:#5bcefa;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;">−</button>
    <button id="zoom-reset" style="background:rgba(15,15,26,0.8);border:1px solid #5bcefa;color:#5bcefa;height:32px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:0 10px;">Reset</button>
  </div>
</div>
<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:2rem;margin-top:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
  <div style="background:rgba(15,15,26,0.687);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:12px;padding:1rem 1.5rem;text-align:center;border:1px solid #2a2a4a;">
    <div style="color:#5bcefa;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;">32</div>
    <div style="color:#b0b0b0;font-size:0.85rem;margin-top:4px;">Countries Visited</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:rgba(15,15,26,0.687);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:12px;padding:1rem 1.5rem;text-align:center;border:1px solid #2a2a4a;">
    <div style="color:#5bcefa;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;">5</div>
    <div style="color:#b0b0b0;font-size:0.85rem;margin-top:4px;">Continents</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:rgba(15,15,26,0.687);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:12px;padding:1rem 1.5rem;text-align:center;border:1px solid #2a2a4a;">
    <div style="color:#5bcefa;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;">16%</div>
    <div style="color:#b0b0b0;font-size:0.85rem;margin-top:4px;">of the World</div>
  </div>
</div>
<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1.5rem;margin-top:1rem;font-size:0.85rem;color:#b0b0b0;">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
    <div style="width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:3px;background:#5bcefa;"></div>
    <span>Visited</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
    <div style="width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:3px;background:#1a1a2e;border:1px solid #2a2a4a;"></div>
    <span>Not yet visited</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const countryInfo = {
    'Egypt': { region: 'Africa' },
    'China': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'Traveled to Beijing and Shanghai.' },
    'Hong Kong': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'A unique blend of East and West with incredible skyline views.' },
    'South Korea': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'My second home, grew up here for half of my life.' },
    'Taiwan': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'Night markets, temples, with incredible food.' },
    'Turkey': { region: 'Europe / Asia', desc: 'Istanbul\'s food scene and incredible vibrant nightlife.' },
    'Indonesia': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'Bali\'s beaches' },
    'Japan': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'From Tokyo\'s energy, Kyoto\'s cultural tranquility to Okinawa\'s beautiful beaches, Japan is one of my favourite destinations.' },
    'Malaysia': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'Lived in Penang for over a month, doing an internship in engineering. The diversity and quality of nightmarket food is perfect.' },
    'Philippines': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'Visited Cebu.' },
    'Singapore': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'The most modern country I have been to with the most culturally diverse population I have ever experienced.' },
    'Oman': { region: 'Middle East' },
    'Qatar': { region: 'Middle East' },
    'Thailand': { region: 'Asia', desc: 'Temples, street food, and tropical islands.' },
    'United Arab Emirates': { region: 'Middle East', desc: 'Dubai\'s futuristic skyline and Abu Dhabi\'s cultural landmarks.' },
    'Austria': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Alpine scenery and Vienna\'s classical charm.' },
    'Croatia': { region: 'Europe' },
    'Czech Republic': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Prague\'s fairytale architecture.' },
    'France': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Paris, and the France\'s countryside in the south.' },
    'Germany': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Where I am from, grew up here across multiple cities.' },
    'Greece': { region: 'Europe' },
    'Ireland': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Currently based in Dublin.' },
    'Italy': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Rome\'s history, Florence\'s art, Venice\'s architecture, and one of the best cuisines in the world.' },
    'Malta': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'A small island with a big personality and fascinating history.' },
    'Netherlands': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Canals, young culture, and a laid-back atmosphere.' },
    'Poland': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Worked here, experienced the culture of Wroclaw.' },
    'Portugal': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Porto\'s beautiful city and Nazare\'s unbelievable waves.' },
    'Spain': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'Barcelona\'s architecture, calm and beautiful nature of Menorca, and the food culture of northern Spain.' },
    'Switzerland': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'The astonishing nature and peaks of the Alps.' },
    'United Kingdom': { region: 'Europe', desc: 'London\'s buzz and entertainment options.' },
    'United States': { region: 'North America', desc: 'The incredible skyline of New York, Los Angeles, Miami, San Francisco, Las Vegas, and the breathtaking nature of Yosemite, and the Grand Canyon.' }
  };

  const visitedCountries = {};
  Object.keys(countryInfo).forEach(function(k) { visitedCountries[k] = countryInfo[k].region; });
  visitedCountries['Czechia'] = 'Europe';

  const nameMapping = {'Czechia':'Czech Republic','United States of America':'United States'};
  const width=1000, height=500;

  const svg = d3.select('#world-map')
    .attr('viewBox', '0 0 ' + width + ' ' + height)
    .attr('preserveAspectRatio', 'xMidYMid meet');

  const g = svg.append('g');

  const projection = d3.geoNaturalEarth1().scale(160).translate([width/2, height/2]);
  const path = d3.geoPath().projection(projection);

  const tooltip = document.getElementById('tooltip');
  const tooltipName = tooltip.querySelector('.country-name');
  const tooltipRegion = tooltip.querySelector('.country-region');
  const popup = document.getElementById('popup');
  const popupName = document.getElementById('popup-name');
  const popupRegion = document.getElementById('popup-region');
  const popupDesc = document.getElementById('popup-desc');
  const popupClose = document.getElementById('popup-close');

  var zoom = d3.zoom()
    .scaleExtent([1, 8])
    .on('zoom', function(event) {
      g.attr('transform', event.transform);
      svg.style('cursor', 'grabbing');
    })
    .on('end', function() {
      svg.style('cursor', 'grab');
    });

  svg.call(zoom);

  document.getElementById('zoom-in').addEventListener('click', function() {
    svg.transition().duration(300).call(zoom.scaleBy, 1.5);
  });
  document.getElementById('zoom-out').addEventListener('click', function() {
    svg.transition().duration(300).call(zoom.scaleBy, 0.67);
  });
  document.getElementById('zoom-reset').addEventListener('click', function() {
    svg.transition().duration(500).call(zoom.transform, d3.zoomIdentity);
  });

  popupClose.addEventListener('click', function() {
    popup.style.display = 'none';
  });

  d3.json('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/world-atlas@2/countries-110m.json').then(function(world) {
    var countries = topojson.feature(world, world.objects.countries);

    var idToName = {
      '004':'Afghanistan','008':'Albania','012':'Algeria','024':'Angola',
      '032':'Argentina','036':'Australia','040':'Austria','050':'Bangladesh',
      '056':'Belgium','064':'Bhutan','068':'Bolivia','070':'Bosnia and Herzegovina',
      '076':'Brazil','100':'Bulgaria','104':'Myanmar','116':'Cambodia',
      '120':'Cameroon','124':'Canada','144':'Sri Lanka','152':'Chile',
      '156':'China','170':'Colombia','180':'Democratic Republic of the Congo',
      '188':'Costa Rica','191':'Croatia','192':'Cuba','196':'Cyprus',
      '203':'Czech Republic','208':'Denmark','214':'Dominican Republic',
      '218':'Ecuador','818':'Egypt','222':'El Salvador','231':'Ethiopia',
      '233':'Estonia','246':'Finland','250':'France','276':'Germany',
      '288':'Ghana','300':'Greece','320':'Guatemala','332':'Haiti',
      '340':'Honduras','348':'Hungary','352':'Iceland','356':'India',
      '360':'Indonesia','364':'Iran','368':'Iraq','372':'Ireland',
      '376':'Israel','380':'Italy','388':'Jamaica','392':'Japan',
      '400':'Jordan','398':'Kazakhstan','404':'Kenya','410':'South Korea',
      '414':'Kuwait','418':'Laos','422':'Lebanon','434':'Libya',
      '440':'Lithuania','442':'Luxembourg','458':'Malaysia','466':'Mali',
      '470':'Malta','484':'Mexico','496':'Mongolia','504':'Morocco',
      '508':'Mozambique','516':'Namibia','524':'Nepal','528':'Netherlands',
      '540':'New Caledonia','554':'New Zealand','558':'Nicaragua','566':'Nigeria',
      '578':'Norway','512':'Oman','586':'Pakistan','591':'Panama',
      '598':'Papua New Guinea','600':'Paraguay','604':'Peru','608':'Philippines',
      '616':'Poland','620':'Portugal','630':'Puerto Rico','634':'Qatar',
      '642':'Romania','643':'Russia','682':'Saudi Arabia','686':'Senegal',
      '688':'Serbia','702':'Singapore','703':'Slovakia','704':'Vietnam',
      '705':'Slovenia','706':'Somalia','710':'South Africa','724':'Spain',
      '736':'Sudan','740':'Suriname','752':'Sweden','756':'Switzerland',
      '760':'Syria','158':'Taiwan','764':'Thailand','780':'Trinidad and Tobago',
      '788':'Tunisia','792':'Turkey','800':'Uganda','804':'Ukraine',
      '784':'United Arab Emirates','826':'United Kingdom',
      '834':'Tanzania','840':'United States of America',
      '854':'Burkina Faso','858':'Uruguay','860':'Uzbekistan',
      '862':'Venezuela','887':'Yemen','894':'Zambia','716':'Zimbabwe'
    };

    g.selectAll('path')
      .data(countries.features)
      .enter()
      .append('path')
      .attr('d', path)
      .style('fill', function(d) {
        var name = idToName[d.id] || '';
        var displayName = nameMapping[name] || name;
        return (visitedCountries[name] || visitedCountries[displayName]) ? '#5bcefa' : '#1a1a2e';
      })
      .style('stroke', '#2a2a4a')
      .style('stroke-width', '0.5')
      .style('cursor', function(d) {
        var name = idToName[d.id] || '';
        var displayName = nameMapping[name] || name;
        return (visitedCountries[name] || visitedCountries[displayName]) ? 'pointer' : 'default';
      })
      .style('transition', 'fill 0.3s ease')
      .on('mouseover', function(event, d) {
        var name = idToName[d.id] || '';
        var displayName = nameMapping[name] || name;
        if (visitedCountries[name] || visitedCountries[displayName]) {
          tooltipName.textContent = displayName || name;
          tooltipRegion.textContent = visitedCountries[name] || visitedCountries[displayName];
          tooltip.style.opacity = '1';
          d3.select(this).style('fill', '#89dceb').style('filter', 'drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(91,206,250,0.5))');
        }
      })
      .on('mousemove', function(event) {
        var container = document.getElementById('map-container');
        var rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
        tooltip.style.left = (event.clientX - rect.left + 15) + 'px';
        tooltip.style.top = (event.clientY - rect.top - 10) + 'px';
      })
      .on('mouseout', function(event, d) {
        tooltip.style.opacity = '0';
        var name = idToName[d.id] || '';
        var displayName = nameMapping[name] || name;
        if (visitedCountries[name] || visitedCountries[displayName]) {
          d3.select(this).style('fill', '#5bcefa').style('filter', 'none');
        }
      })
      .on('click', function(event, d) {
        var name = idToName[d.id] || '';
        var displayName = nameMapping[name] || name;
        var lookupName = displayName || name;
        if (countryInfo[lookupName]) {
          popupName.textContent = lookupName;
          popupRegion.textContent = countryInfo[lookupName].region;
          popupDesc.textContent = countryInfo[lookupName].desc;
          var container = document.getElementById('map-container');
          var rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
          var x = event.clientX - rect.left;
          var y = event.clientY - rect.top;
          if (x + 340 > rect.width) x = rect.width - 340;
          if (x < 0) x = 10;
          popup.style.left = x + 'px';
          popup.style.top = y + 'px';
          popup.style.display = 'block';
          tooltip.style.opacity = '0';
        }
      });
  });

  document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (!popup.contains(e.target) && !e.target.closest('path')) {
      popup.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });
});
</script>
